message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "Application" as Application
participant "«engine» Auto SDK Engine" as Engine
participant "«avs» Alexa" as Alexa

note right of User
"Turn off AC"
end note

User -> Application : "Turn off AC"

Application -> Alexa : PowerController.TurnOff directive

Alexa -> Application : Receive SetPowerControllerValue message

Application -> Application : Turn off AC

Application -> Engine : Publish SetControllerValueMessage Reply

Engine -> Alexa : Alexa.Response event

Alexa -> Application : SpeechSynthesizer.Speak directive «Alexa speech response»

Application -> User : Alexa.Response event

@enduml
